name: IPFS Podcasting
compose:
name: slashnode-ipfs-podcasting
services:
  web:
    image: ipfspodcasting/podcastnode:v0.6
    container_name: ipfs-podcasting
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    volumes:
      - web_ipfs:/ipfs-podcasting/ipfs
      - web_cfg:/ipfs-podcasting/cfg
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8675:8675
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_ipfs:
    name: slashnode-ipfs-podcasting_web_ipfs
  web_cfg:
    name: slashnode-ipfs-podcasting_web_cfg
